languages.text: "Неизвестный где-то добыл ритуальный меч эльдаров, изукрашенный их религиозными письменами. Я бы с удовольствием обзавел{mf|ся|ась} таким".
"The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."
languages.original_text: "Неизвестный где-то добыл ритуальный меч эльдаров, изукрашенный их религиозными письменами. Я бы с удовольствием обзавел{mf|ся|ась} таким".

traits.locale_text: "The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."
"The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."
"The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

languages.text: “画像里那个身份不明的人，不知怎么搞到了一把艾达灵族的仪式佩剑，上面还刻有他们的宗教文字。能拥有这种东西，倒也是一桩乐事。”
languages.original_text: "The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

traits.locale_text: “画像里那个身份不明的人，不知怎么搞到了一把艾达灵族的仪式佩剑，上面还刻有他们的宗教文字。能拥有这种东西，倒也是一桩乐事。”

languages.text: «El sujeto anónimo del retrato obtuvo de alguna manera una espada ritual Aeldari decorada con sus escrituras religiosas. Me encantaría hacerme con semejante pieza».
languages.original_text: "The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

traits.locale_text: «El sujeto anónimo del retrato obtuvo de alguna manera una espada ritual Aeldari decorada con sus escrituras religiosas. Me encantaría hacerme con semejante pieza».

languages.text: « Le sujet inconnu du portrait avait mis la main sur une épée rituelle aeldari ornée de leurs écritures religieuses. Je serais {mf|ravi|ravie} de posséder un tel objet. »
languages.original_text: "The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

traits.locale_text: « Le sujet inconnu du portrait avait mis la main sur une épée rituelle aeldari ornée de leurs écritures religieuses. Je serais {mf|ravi|ravie} de posséder un tel objet. »

languages.text: "Die unbekannte Person auf dem Porträt hatte sich irgendwie eines Ritualschwertes mit den religiösen Schriften der Aeldari bemächtigt. Ich besäße gerne ein solches Ding."
languages.original_text: "The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

traits.locale_text: "Die unbekannte Person auf dem Porträt hatte sich irgendwie eines Ritualschwertes mit den religiösen Schriften der Aeldari bemächtigt. Ich besäße gerne ein solches Ding."

languages.text: "Portredeki bilinmeyen kişi, bir şekilde dinî yazılarıyla süslenmiş bir Aeldari ayin kılıcı elde etmiş. Böyle bir şeye sahip olmaktan zevk duyardım."
languages.original_text: "The unknown subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

traits.locale_text: "Portredeki bilinmeyen kişi, bir şekilde dinî yazılarıyla süslenmiş bir Aeldari ayin kılıcı elde etmiş. Böyle bir şeye sahip olmaktan zevk duyardım."

languages.text: 「肖像画のモデルは、何者かによって、宗教的な文字が飾られたエルダリの儀式用剣を手に入れた。そんなものを手に入れるのは、喜びだろう。」
languages.original_text: "The unnamed subject of the portrait somehow obtained an Aeldari ritual sword decorated with their religious writings. It would be a pleasure to possess such a thing."

traits.locale_text: 「肖像画のモデルは、何者かによって、宗教的な文字が飾られたエルダリの儀式用剣を手に入れた。そんなものを手に入れるのは、喜びだろう。」
